title: Meeting Agenda Template
scenario: Create a meeting agenda template for a team with multiple topics, action items, and attendees. The template should include topic headings, time allocations, and attendee roles. The template should be suitable for a weekly team meeting and should accommodate 5 topics and 10 attendees.
constraints: Must use a consistent format for topic headings and time allocations
Must include a note for action items and follow-up tasks
Must include a note for attendee roles and responsibilities

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the template adheres to the given constraints.
Check if topic headings and time allocations are accurate and complete.
Check if attendee roles and responsibilities are accurate and complete.
